setup: DB_NAME=$(echo '{{folder}}' | tr '-' '_') && php -r '$db=$argv[1]; (new PDO("mysql:host=127.0.0.1","root",""))->exec("CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS `$db`");' -- $DB_NAME
archive: DB_NAME=$(echo '{{folder}}' | tr '-' '_') && php -r '$db=$argv[1]; (new PDO("mysql:host=127.0.0.1","root",""))->exec("DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS `$db`");' -- $DB_NAME
